text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash breathes a sigh of relief upon
finishing the Kikuka Sho without incident.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Physically, she's back to full strength. After
gaining valuable experience in the Classic Triple
Crown, it's time to move on to the Japan Cup.
